---
title: "Tools"
author: "Trey Saddler"
date: "2024/03/31"
---

## Introduction

This page will document various tools that could help with this process.

- [LangChain Model Laboratory](https://python.langchain.com/docs/guides/model_laboratory)
- [Microsoft PromptBench](https://github.com/microsoft/promptbench)
- [HegelAI PromptTools](https://github.com/hegelai/prompttools)
- [Awesome-ML LLM Tools - GitHub](https://github.com/underlines/awesome-ml/blob/master/llm-tools.md#benchmark-suites)
- [PromptingGuide.ai | Dair.ai](https://www.promptingguide.ai/tools)
- [OpenAGI | GitHub](https://github.com/agiresearch/OpenAGI)
